# Melties

> The world's cutest melting friends — a short-form character world posted daily on TikTok. Tagline: "Every Day Melts Better."

Melties (メルティーズ) is an original kawaii character IP. Each character "melts" for the thing it loves most. Seven characters so far, with more added regularly.

## Characters
- Melty (pink) — the curious leader who brings everyone together
- Game (purple) — zones out completely when focused on games
- Book (yellow) — calm and endlessly curious; loves reading
- Screen (teal) — bright; soaks up way too much video
- Popcorn — cheerful and always excited; loves movies
- Ice Cream (blue) — sweet; makes everyone smile
- Sleep (purple) — mellow and sleepy; loves naps

## Links
- Website: https://melties.world/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@melties.world
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/melties.world
